mapper.insert: insert into furniture (f_code, c_id, c_kind, c_name, f_name, f_price, f_dprice, f_createddate, f_catagory1, f_catagory2, f_catagory3, f_catagory4, f_catagory5, f_discount, f_point, f_count, f_viewcount, f_deliveryPrice) values ( #{f_code}, #{c_id}, #{c_kind}, #{c_name}, #{f_name}, #{f_price}, #{f_dprice}, sysdate, #{f_catagory1}, #{f_catagory2}, #{f_catagory3}, #{f_catagory4}, #{f_catagory5}, #{f_discount}, #{f_point}, #{f_count}, 0, #{f_deliveryPrice})
mapper.update: update furniture set f_name = #{f_name}, f_price = #{f_price}, f_dprice = #{f_dprice}, f_catagory1 = #{f_catagory1}, f_catagory2 = #{f_catagory2}, f_catagory3 = #{f_catagory3}, f_catagory4 = #{f_catagory4}, f_catagory5 = #{f_catagory5}, f_discount = #{f_discount}, f_point = #{f_point}, f_count = #{f_count}, f_deliveryPrice = #{f_deliveryPrice} where f_code = #{f_code}
mapper.select:
select * from ( select rownum rnum, data.* from ( select f_code, c_id, c_kind, c_name, f_name, f_price, f_dprice, f_createddate, f_catagory1, f_catagory2, f_catagory3, f_catagory4, f_catagory5, f_discount, f_point, f_count, f_viewcount, f_deliveryPrice from furniture where ${searchKey} like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' order by f_createddate desc ) data)
where rnum>=#{start} and rnum<=#{end}

select f_code, c_id, c_kind, c_name, f_name, f_price, f_dprice, f_createddate, f_catagory1, f_catagory2, f_catagory3, f_catagory4, f_catagory5, f_discount, f_point, f_count, f_viewcount, f_deliveryPrice from furniture where f_code = #{f_code}
select Count(*) from furniture where ${searchKey} like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
